headline: FedEx Freight Holding Company issued $3.7 billion in senior notes across four tranches in preparation for its planned spin-off from FedEx Corporation.
investor_impact: This $3.7 billion debt raise establishes the standalone capital structure for FedEx Freight, marking a critical execution milestone toward the planned spin-off. The successful placement provides visibility into the subsidiary's cost of debt and paves the way for the distribution of at least 80.1% of its shares, likely unlocking sum-of-the-parts valuation upside for FDX shareholders.
key_figures: 80.1% minimum common stock distribution required for the Spin-Off
